7528.one_line_summary: Address convention for representing ETH in ERC-20 token contexts using 0xeeee...eeee.
7528.notes: Complements ERC-4626 and ERC-20 by standardizing ETH representation; used extensively by liquid staking protocols.

7529.one_line_summary: Discover and verify smart contracts via DNS TXT records with eTLD+1 domain association.
7529.notes: Enables off-chain verification of smart contract ownership using DoH; useful for anti-spoofing and contract discoverability.

7531.one_line_summary: Recognize NFT ownership when staked in pools via RightsHolderChange events.
7531.notes: Solves legacy NFT staking challenges by tracking actual owners separately from technical holders; supports flexible rights types.

7533.one_line_summary: Public Cross Port for connecting EVM chains via pull-based cross-chain messaging with MerkleTree packing.
7533.notes: Reduces cross-chain bridges from O(n^2) to O(n); enables redundant bridge verification for enhanced security.

7535.one_line_summary: ERC-4626 tokenized vaults with native ETH as underlying asset instead of ERC-20.
7535.notes: Extends ERC-4626 specifically for ETH and native assets; primary use case is liquid staking tokens.

7538.one_line_summary: Add multiplier field to ERC-20 and ERC-1155 metadata for fractional token display.
7538.notes: Enables fractional/deflation mechanisms without standard decimals; uses ERC-1046 tokenURI for metadata.

7540.one_line_summary: Async deposit/redemption requests for ERC-4626 vaults with pending/claimable/claimed states.
7540.notes: Extends ERC-4626 for async vaults (LSTs, RWA protocols); operators can manage requests on behalf of controllers.

7546.one_line_summary: Upgradeable Clone pattern combining function-level upgradeability with factory cloneability.
7546.notes: Separates Dictionary from Proxy for factory-friendly simultaneous upgrades; addresses ERC-2535 limitations.

7548.one_line_summary: Protocol for remixing NFTs to create derivative works with traceable relationships on-chain.
7548.notes: Extends ERC-721 with remix, license, and network modules; tracks IP lineage through singleton network module.

7555.one_line_summary: Single sign-on for discovering accounts using non-secp256k1 signing keys (passkeys, etc).
7555.notes: Solves account fragmentation for ERC-4337 with alternative signers; redirect-based SSO pattern for key discovery.

7561.one_line_summary: Simplified ERC-721 for smart contract wallets; removes approve/safeTransferFrom functions.
7561.notes: Forward-compatible simplification designed for contract wallets; shifts approval to wallet level instead of NFT contract.

7562.one_line_summary: Validation scope rules for ERC-4337 account abstraction to prevent DoS via unpaid computation.
7562.notes: Defines opcode restrictions, storage isolation, reputation system for bundlers; critical mempool security rules.

7564.one_line_summary: Smart contract wallet interface for managing NFT approvals and transfers with granular controls.
7564.notes: Shifts NFT approval control to wallet level with support for batch operations and custom hooks.

7565.one_line_summary: Perpetual contract NFTs representing locked assets that can be collateralized for loans.
7565.notes: Enables DeFi composability by allowing LP/staking NFTs to be used as collateral; integrates with ERC-4907.

7566.one_line_summary: Multiplayer game communication protocol using rooms for player grouping and messages for game actions.
7566.notes: Room-based architecture with message relay; designed for turn-based/strategy on-chain games rather than real-time.
